name: ibn-core v2.0.1 — ATT&CK coverage assessment
description: Threat-informed ATT&CK assessment of ibn-core (Apache 2.0 open core) — an RFC 9315 / TMF921 v5.0.0 Intent-Based Networking platform embedding Claude via the Model Context Protocol. Scoring shows residual risk AFTER the in-code controls (AI Gateway: prompt-injection / PII+DLP / tool-policy RBAC; Istio mTLS; JWT/API-key auth; OpenTelemetry audit trail). Green = Mitigated (80) · Amber = PartiallyMitigated (50) · Red = Open (20). © 2026 Vpnet Cloud Solutions Sdn. Bhd. — Apache 2.0.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] TMF921 API behind Istio ingress; JWT/API-key auth; AI Gateway prompt-injection check on request body; idempotency in Redis. Gap: no managed WAF; no recent third-party pentest.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: TMF921 API behind Istio ingress; JWT/API-key auth; AI Gateway prompt-injection check on request body; idempotency in Redis. Gap: no managed WAF; no recent third-party pentest.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] MCP back-ends called over mTLS; ToolPolicyEngine RBAC denies non-allowlisted tools. Gap: requester SessionContext not yet threaded into MCP calls (live provenance attribution pending).

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: MCP back-ends called over mTLS; ToolPolicyEngine RBAC denies non-allowlisted tools. Gap: requester SessionContext not yet threaded into MCP calls (live provenance attribution pending).

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Auth supports api-key, JWT (RS256 against Keycloak JWKS), or both; named roles (customer/agent/admin). Gap: no formal key-rotation SOP documented for downstream operators.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Auth supports api-key, JWT (RS256 against Keycloak JWKS), or both; named roles (customer/agent/admin). Gap: no formal key-rotation SOP documented for downstream operators.

techniques.comment: [Mitigated] Helm chart ships no default credentials; values.yaml requires explicit secret injection. Image build forbids baked-in tokens.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Helm chart ships no default credentials; values.yaml requires explicit secret injection. Image build forbids baked-in tokens.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Anthropic and LangSmith secrets in k8s Secrets, envFrom; rotation possible. Gap: no external KMS integration; SOPS/sealed-secrets recommended for operators.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Anthropic and LangSmith secrets in k8s Secrets, envFrom; rotation possible. Gap: no external KMS integration; SOPS/sealed-secrets recommended for operators.

techniques.comment: [Open] GitHub Actions CodeQL scan; dependabot; NOTICE file lists upstream dependencies. Gap: no SBOM published; container images not signed (cosign/sigstore on roadmap).

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: GitHub Actions CodeQL scan; dependabot; NOTICE file lists upstream dependencies. Gap: no SBOM published; container images not signed (cosign/sigstore on roadmap).

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Component runs under a least-privilege ServiceAccount; chart NetworkPolicy templates ship; Istio mTLS PeerAuthentication. Gap: PSA/PodSecurity admission profile is operator-side.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Component runs under a least-privilege ServiceAccount; chart NetworkPolicy templates ship; Istio mTLS PeerAuthentication. Gap: PSA/PodSecurity admission profile is operator-side.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] k8s RBAC on the SA forbids exec into peer pods; Istio AuthorizationPolicy limits intra-mesh access. Gap: no runtime detection (Falco/Tetragon) included.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: k8s RBAC on the SA forbids exec into peer pods; Istio AuthorizationPolicy limits intra-mesh access. Gap: no runtime detection (Falco/Tetragon) included.

techniques.comment: [Mitigated] AI Gateway gates the model call: prompt-injection block prevents unauthorised model invocations; ClaudeConfig caps max_tokens and pins model+temperature; both LLM calls are single-turn JSON extractions, not free agent loops.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: AI Gateway gates the model call: prompt-injection block prevents unauthorised model invocations; ClaudeConfig caps max_tokens and pins model+temperature; both LLM calls are single-turn JSON extractions, not free agent loops.

techniques.comment: [Open] Operator-side concern. Gap: no image signing (cosign), no admission policy that verifies signatures. To be addressed alongside SBOM/sigstore work.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Operator-side concern. Gap: no image signing (cosign), no admission policy that verifies signatures. To be addressed alongside SBOM/sigstore work.

techniques.comment: [Open] Out of primary scope for v2.0.1 (Kubernetes Deployment, not serverless). Reassess if operator pushes ibn-core into a FaaS runtime.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Out of primary scope for v2.0.1 (Kubernetes Deployment, not serverless). Reassess if operator pushes ibn-core into a FaaS runtime.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] manage_api_keys is admin-only via ToolPolicyEngine; account changes leave OTel trace events. Gap: no rate-limit on admin-tier ops.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: manage_api_keys is admin-only via ToolPolicyEngine; account changes leave OTel trace events. Gap: no rate-limit on admin-tier ops.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Chart RBAC is minimal (controllerRole declared in Component CR). Gap: operator must audit RoleBindings post-install; no built-in drift detection.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Chart RBAC is minimal (controllerRole declared in Component CR). Gap: operator must audit RoleBindings post-install; no built-in drift detection.

techniques.comment: [Open] Same as T1204.003 — image-signing gap. Recommended: ship cosign signatures with chart releases.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Same as T1204.003 — image-signing gap. Recommended: ship cosign signatures with chart releases.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Component is a Deployment, not a DaemonSet or static pod; no privileged init containers. Gap: operator-side admission controls.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Component is a Deployment, not a DaemonSet or static pod; no privileged init containers. Gap: operator-side admission controls.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Pods run as non-root; securityContext drops capabilities; readOnlyRootFilesystem where possible. Gap: no sandboxed runtime (gVisor/Kata) shipped by default.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Pods run as non-root; securityContext drops capabilities; readOnlyRootFilesystem where possible. Gap: no sandboxed runtime (gVisor/Kata) shipped by default.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Kernel/runtime patching is operator-side. Mitigated by minimal-base images, but residual depends on operator CIS-benchmark adherence.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Kernel/runtime patching is operator-side. Mitigated by minimal-base images, but residual depends on operator CIS-benchmark adherence.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] OTel attribution per span (service.name/version, oda.component.*); structured pino logs. Gap: no end-to-end identity passing to MCP — tracked follow-up.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: OTel attribution per span (service.name/version, oda.component.*); structured pino logs. Gap: no end-to-end identity passing to MCP — tracked follow-up.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Component CR is the canonical identity; ImagePullPolicy=IfNotPresent in chart. Gap: typosquat protection on dependencies relies on dependabot only.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Component CR is the canonical identity; ImagePullPolicy=IfNotPresent in chart. Gap: typosquat protection on dependencies relies on dependabot only.

techniques.comment: [Mitigated] OTLP traces are exported to an EXTERNAL backend (LangSmith EU by default, or Canvas-managed collector). A local attacker cannot delete the audit record without compromising the external sink as well.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: OTLP traces are exported to an EXTERNAL backend (LangSmith EU by default, or Canvas-managed collector). A local attacker cannot delete the audit record without compromising the external sink as well.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] src/telemetry.ts MUST be the very first import (documented hard rule in CLAUDE.md). HIGH-tier injection blocks are non-overridable. Gap: AI Gateway control toggles are config-driven; operator can weaken MEDIUM/LOW tiers.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: src/telemetry.ts MUST be the very first import (documented hard rule in CLAUDE.md). HIGH-tier injection blocks are non-overridable. Gap: AI Gateway control toggles are config-driven; operator can weaken MEDIUM/LOW tiers.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Same as T1562; additionally, the AI Gateway emits ai_gateway.* events on every fire so disabled-control drift is visible in traces.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Same as T1562; additionally, the AI Gateway emits ai_gateway.* events on every fire so disabled-control drift is visible in traces.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] OTel export is async; loss of connectivity to the OTLP backend stores buffered spans, then drops oldest. Gap: no immutable audit-log mirror (e.g., to object storage).

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: OTel export is async; loss of connectivity to the OTLP backend stores buffered spans, then drops oldest. Gap: no immutable audit-log mirror (e.g., to object storage).

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] All credentials live in k8s Secrets, injected via envFrom; .gitignore excludes .env. Gap: no external KMS by default; sealed-secrets recommended.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: All credentials live in k8s Secrets, injected via envFrom; .gitignore excludes .env. Gap: no external KMS by default; sealed-secrets recommended.

techniques.comment: [Mitigated] Repo policy in CLAUDE.md forbids committing .env, API keys, or operator credentials; CodeQL scan rule in CI.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Repo policy in CLAUDE.md forbids committing .env, API keys, or operator credentials; CodeQL scan rule in CI.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] ServiceAccount has minimal RBAC; no cluster-admin rights. Gap: token projection lifetimes are operator-side.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: ServiceAccount has minimal RBAC; no cluster-admin rights. Gap: token projection lifetimes are operator-side.

techniques.comment: [Mitigated] Direct ibn-core control: PII masker replaces raw email/phone/address with sentinels before any LLM call; per-role DLP allowlists redact non-allowed fields in MCP responses; model never sees secrets via conversation.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Direct ibn-core control: PII masker replaces raw email/phone/address with sentinels before any LLM call; per-role DLP allowlists redact non-allowed fields in MCP responses; model never sees secrets via conversation.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Keycloak JWTs are short-lived (RS256, JWKS validated per call); api-keys are scoped by role. Gap: no proof-of-possession (DPoP) yet.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Keycloak JWTs are short-lived (RS256, JWKS validated per call); api-keys are scoped by role. Gap: no proof-of-possession (DPoP) yet.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Istio rate-limit; key-based auth preferred over passwords. Gap: no account-lockout policy on JWT subjects (operator-side).

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Istio rate-limit; key-based auth preferred over passwords. Gap: no account-lockout policy on JWT subjects (operator-side).

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] JWTs validated against Keycloak JWKS (RS256, kid-bound). Gap: depends on operator's realm hygiene.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: JWTs validated against Keycloak JWKS (RS256, kid-bound). Gap: depends on operator's realm hygiene.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Minimal SA permissions; NetworkPolicy templates. Gap: operator-side namespace separation.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Minimal SA permissions; NetworkPolicy templates. Gap: operator-side namespace separation.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] TMF921 endpoints do not enumerate users; admin tools (manage_api_keys) are admin-role only.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: TMF921 endpoints do not enumerate users; admin tools (manage_api_keys) are admin-role only.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] No cross-tenant discovery surface in the API; Keycloak realm is the auth boundary.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: No cross-tenant discovery surface in the API; Keycloak realm is the auth boundary.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Istio mesh enforces mTLS PeerAuthentication; NetworkPolicy templates restrict pod-to-pod. Gap: no zero-trust egress enforcement by default.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Istio mesh enforces mTLS PeerAuthentication; NetworkPolicy templates restrict pod-to-pod. Gap: no zero-trust egress enforcement by default.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] MCP capability enumeration is gated by ToolPolicyEngine; getCapabilities() reflects the caller's role.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: MCP capability enumeration is gated by ToolPolicyEngine; getCapabilities() reflects the caller's role.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Anthropic API key is single-purpose; MCP back-ends are scoped per ibn-core deployment. No re-use of tokens across tenants.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Anthropic API key is single-purpose; MCP back-ends are scoped per ibn-core deployment. No re-use of tokens across tenants.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] JWT validation per request; no session cookies. Gap: no token-binding.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: JWT validation per request; no session cookies. Gap: no token-binding.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] MCP per-role DLP allowlists reduce blast radius of any automated extraction attempt; redaction is schema-preserving so consumers see structure without content.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: MCP per-role DLP allowlists reduce blast radius of any automated extraction attempt; redaction is schema-preserving so consumers see structure without content.

techniques.comment: [Mitigated] ToolPolicyEngine deny-by-default; only role-allowlisted tools (e.g. get_customer_profile, list_products) can read repository data; admin-only tools (update_customer_profile) gated.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: ToolPolicyEngine deny-by-default; only role-allowlisted tools (e.g. get_customer_profile, list_products) can read repository data; admin-only tools (update_customer_profile) gated.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Redis SSoT runs in-cluster; not exposed externally. Gap: no encryption-at-rest enforcement enforced by chart (depends on storage class).

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Redis SSoT runs in-cluster; not exposed externally. Gap: no encryption-at-rest enforcement enforced by chart (depends on storage class).

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Egress restricted to known endpoints (Anthropic API, OTLP backend, Keycloak). Gap: egress allowlist is operator-configurable; not hard-enforced by chart.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Egress restricted to known endpoints (Anthropic API, OTLP backend, Keycloak). Gap: egress allowlist is operator-configurable; not hard-enforced by chart.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] AI Gateway DLP truncates outbound MCP payloads; Istio egress policy templates ship. Gap: same as T1071.001 — egress hard-enforcement is operator-side.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: AI Gateway DLP truncates outbound MCP payloads; Istio egress policy templates ship. Gap: same as T1071.001 — egress hard-enforcement is operator-side.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Outbound to non-allowlisted endpoints blocked by Istio policy templates. Gap: model itself can be coerced via prompt to compose data into the response — mitigated by DLP allowlists on what the model can see in the first place.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Outbound to non-allowlisted endpoints blocked by Istio policy templates. Gap: model itself can be coerced via prompt to compose data into the response — mitigated by DLP allowlists on what the model can see in the first place.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] No direct cloud-storage SDK in ibn-core; would require operator-installed adapter.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: No direct cloud-storage SDK in ibn-core; would require operator-installed adapter.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] cancel_order/manage_api_keys are admin-only; Redis persistence policy depends on operator backup. Gap: no chart-level point-in-time backup.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: cancel_order/manage_api_keys are admin-only; Redis persistence policy depends on operator backup. Gap: no chart-level point-in-time backup.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] HPA configured (replicaCount baseline 2); Istio rate-limit templates. Gap: no per-API-key quota; budget controls for AI-call cost not enforced by code.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: HPA configured (replicaCount baseline 2); Istio rate-limit templates. Gap: no per-API-key quota; budget controls for AI-call cost not enforced by code.

techniques.comment: [Mitigated] AI Gateway prevents unauthorised LLM calls (an unauthorised request consumes 0 tokens at Scenario D, 1 LLM call at Scenario C); ClaudeConfig max_tokens cap bounds per-call spend; k8s resource limits on container.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: AI Gateway prevents unauthorised LLM calls (an unauthorised request consumes 0 tokens at Scenario D, 1 LLM call at Scenario C); ClaudeConfig max_tokens cap bounds per-call spend; k8s resource limits on container.

techniques.comment: [Mitigated] Same as T1496.
[PartiallyMitigated] Git history immutable; OTel sink external; chart can be reinstalled. Gap: Redis recovery depends on operator backup strategy.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Git history immutable; OTel sink external; chart can be reinstalled. Gap: Redis recovery depends on operator backup strategy.

techniques.comment: [PartiallyMitigated] Order-creating tools allowed for agent role; cancel_order admin-only. Quote acceptance is upstream of ibn-core and requires explicit human action. Gap: no anti-fraud heuristics on offer-acceptance loop.

metadata.name: Control summary
metadata.value: Order-creating tools allowed for agent role; cancel_order admin-only. Quote acceptance is upstream of ibn-core and requires explicit human action. Gap: no anti-fraud heuristics on offer-acceptance loop.

legendItems.label: Open — primary control missing / out of scope (20)
